subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of the Truth! Praise be to God that thou hast, in very truth, adorned the gathering with thy devotions and supplications, and in the wilderness of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق الحمد لله براستی در محفل تبتل و تضرع مجلس آراستی و در صحرای محبت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant, @love of God
